text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to sit at my desk and get some work
done, when...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: From under the desk comes... Drum roll, please! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I wanted to hang out with you, so I've been
waiting.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nothing gets my engines going lately—not even
racing or hanging out with my friends...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Even now, they're barely purring...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's still feeling tired. Going forward, I
should probably reevaluate her race schedule to
ensure her best performance.
